batchSize.description: Maximum number of events sent in a batch (Default 100).

payLoadSize.description: Maximum number of events sent in a batch (Default 100).

producerThreads.title: Number of Producer Threads
producerThreads.description: Number of threads to use for reindexing

consumerThreads.title: Number of Consumer Threads
consumerThreads.description: Number of threads to use for reindexing

maxConcurrentRequests.title: Max Concurrent Requests
maxConcurrentRequests.description: Maximum number of concurrent requests to the search index

maxRetries.title: Max Retries
maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retries for a failed request

queueSize.title: Queue Size to use.
queueSize.description: Queue Size to user internally for reindexing.

autoTune.title: Auto Tune
autoTune.description: Enable automatic performance tuning based on cluster capabilities and database entity count

useDistributedIndexing.title: Use Distributed Indexing
useDistributedIndexing.description: Enable distributed indexing to scale reindexing across multiple servers with fault tolerance and parallel processing

partitionSize.title: Partition Size
partitionSize.description: Number of entities per partition for distributed indexing. Smaller values create more partitions for better distribution across servers. Range: 1000-50000.

timeSeriesMaxDays.title: Time Series Max Days
timeSeriesMaxDays.description: Maximum age in days for time series data during reindexing. Default 0 (index all data). Set to a positive value like 15 to limit to recent data only.

timeSeriesEntityDays.title: Time Series Entity Days Override
timeSeriesEntityDays.description: Per-entity-type override for time series max days. Keys are entity type names (e.g. testCaseResult, queryCostRecord), values are number of days. Entities not listed here use the default Time Series Max Days value.
